## Pre-Development Checklist

See [checklist.md](../.cursor/skills/pre-development-checklist/checklist.md)

### Mandatory

- [ ] Scope + AC documented
- [ ] OpenAPI + Zod registered before handlers
- [ ] Service + API + UI tests (TDD where applicable)
- [ ] Auth/RBAC on all new routes
- [ ] SCSS semantic tokens only (no hardcoded hex/px)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` / `pnpm lint` / `pnpm test` / `pnpm build` pass
- [ ] Chromatic reviewed (UI changes)
